# BRIEF

## Goal

Start collecting public page view counts for each project/menu.

## Success Criteria

- Active public page load increments a project view counter.
- Missing and disabled public pages do not increment.
- Project list/detail APIs expose total view count and last viewed timestamp for future UI placement.
- Backend tests cover increment behavior.

## Non-Goals

- Unique visitor analytics.
- Language-level analytics.
- Dashboard UI display.
- Time-series charts.
